reasoning: The base rate of pilot-reported UFOs to NUFORC specifically from South America in any given single month is likely quite low. While NUFORC occasionally receives such reports (e.g., Brazil in Dec 2024), NUFORC is primarily a US-centric, English-language database, meaning the vast majority of its overall reports come from North America. To meet the criteria, the report must be both from a pilot AND from South America AND occur in the specific one-month window of June 2025. Given that pilot reports make up only a small fraction of total reports, and South American reports also make up a small fraction, the intersection of these two filters for a single month implies a low-probability event, estimated at roughly 10-15%.
